Homebrew Formulae

This is a listing of all packages available from the core tap via the Homebrew package manager for macOS and Linux.

/api/formula.json (JSON API)

a2ps 4.15.8 Any-to-PostScript filter
a52dec 0.8.0 Library for decoding ATSC A/52 streams (AKA 'AC-3')

aarch64-elf-gdb 17.2 GNU debugger for aarch64-elf cross development
